etf._cumulative_aum_note: Approximation from sum of historical flows — does not reflect NAV changes

btc_etf._cumulative_aum_note: Approximation from sum of historical flows — does not reflect NAV changes

eth_etf._cumulative_aum_note: Approximation from sum of historical flows — does not reflect NAV changes

regulatory.status: CONFIRMED — MOMENTUM BUT GOVERNANCE GAP WIDENING. Sacks departure, no replacement. Tillis stablecoin text next week.

institutional_custody.status: STRONG — EXPANDING. EDX Markets (Citadel Securities-backed) applying for national trust bank charter signals deepening institutional crypto infrastructure. Ripple Treasury adds managed custody for corporates.

xrpl_infrastructure.status: ACCELERATING — PRODUCT MILESTONE. Ripple Treasury with native on-chain Digital Asset Accounts is the first enterprise treasury system with embedded blockchain capabilities. 190 txns in sampled ledger, DEX volume $4.7M/24h.

stablecoin_adoption.status: CONTRACTING — $1.308B market cap, $340M on-chain XRPL. Decline accelerating despite geographic expansion (Coinone KRW). Product thesis intact, adoption metrics deteriorating.

macro_environment.status: CRITICAL — FULL COMPOUND BREACH. Brent $121.88 (emergency), USD/JPY 158.32 (elevated), JGB 2.274% (approaching elevated). Iran escalation active. All three stress legs loaded.

probability.last_reasoning: Bear probability increased from 14% to 18% to reflect compound stress matrix approaching emergency. USD/JPY at 159.60, Brent at $121.88, Fear & Greed at 12, and ETF flow reversal all compress the near-term outlook. Base case narrowed from 42% to 44% (absorbing some mid-case risk). Mid case trimmed slightly to 28% from 32% — the macro headwinds make the mid-case harder to reach by EOY without stress resolution. Bull trimmed to 10% from 12%. The institutional thesis (Kroll rating, Franklin Templeton activity) prevents a larger bear shift, but macro dominates the distribution when stress is this loaded.

action_reasoning: Upgrading from INCREASE_MONITORING to REDUCE_EXPOSURE. The Blind Auditor advisory is correct — evidence trajectory and action trajectory have diverged. Every quantifiable kill switch metric has deteriorated or stagnated this cycle. RLUSD is at a new low. ETF AUM is declining. PermDEX has zero adoption at 44 days. Hidden Road is deploying elsewhere. The compound stress environment at CRITICAL with days-level operator action window creates immediate position risk. The Kroll rating is the sole concrete positive signal, and while genuine, it is a prerequisite for future adoption, not evidence of current adoption. I am no longer waiting for specific imminent evidence — the RLUSD cyclical/structural question (ACQ-001) is the highest-value determination, but I should not hold full position while waiting for that answer. REDUCE_EXPOSURE is proportional to WEAKENING thesis status with medium confidence.
commander_summary: The thesis is weakening because the primary measurable adoption metrics are deteriorating while institutional infrastructure prerequisites advance. RLUSD at a new low ($1.371B, below the prior $1.494B contraction floor), XRP ETF AUM declining ($1.117B), zero PermDEX adoption at 44 days, and Hidden Road deploying on Hyperliquid instead of XRPL constitute a pattern where every quantifiable adoption metric has either declined or shown no progress this cycle. The Kroll rating is genuine institutional progress but is a prerequisite, not evidence of adoption. The compound stress environment at CRITICAL with cascade proximity imminent adds temporal pressure — the kill switch math becomes exponentially harder with each cycle of decline. I assign medium confidence rather than high because: (1) the cyclical/structural question for RLUSD is unresolved and could materially change the picture, and (2) the Kroll rating represents a real institutional capability that could produce observable adoption in coming months. Per BC-001, I verify: multiple independent data points confirm the declining metrics (RLUSD from CoinGecko, ETF from Coinglass, PermDEX from on-chain — independent sources). The medium confidence is justified.

signal_matrix.description: Null hypothesis holds — physical supply disruption explains price. No Layer 3 adjustment needed. Compound stress inference (VALID) confirms mechanical linkage to other stress legs.

signal_matrix.signal: USD/JPY breaches elevated threshold, approaching critical
signal_matrix.description: Null hypothesis holds. Layer 3 correctly noted compound stress linkage and BOJ intervention zone proximity but did not predict intervention (per CL-035). No adjustment.
Contextual sentiment signal. Layer 3 correctly did not draw institutional inferences. Counter-cyclical institutional investment pattern noted but does not change the sentiment reading itself.

signal_matrix.signal: RLUSD market cap decline to NEW LOW
signal_matrix.description: Layer 3 FLAGGED inference (stablecoin declining during risk-off is anomalous) at reduced weight. The new-low factual data stands at full weight. Competitive-loss interpretation at 25% effective weight due to 2 assumptions + partial data. The factual reading is the most materially negative thesis data point. Layer 3 track record (-0.22 drift) suggests historical over-scoring, but new-low below prior floor is a structural change justifying the score.

signal_matrix.signal: XRP ETF AUM declined, weekly outflows
signal_matrix.description: Null hypothesis (sector-wide risk-off) fully explains. Layer 3 contextualization with BTC/ETH outflows reduces XRP-specific concern. Reducing by 1.

signal_matrix.signal: Ripple Prime receives Kroll investment grade issuer rating
signal_matrix.description: VALID inference about counterparty credentialization at 50% weight (partial data — no rating document). The action itself (Kroll issuing rating) is verified and significant per LZ-EH-003. However, per BC-001 behavioral calibration, I check: evidence base relies on a single intermediary source (Garlinghouse tweet about Kroll action). I cap confidence at medium. Score maintained at 7 because the action is real even if details are incomplete.

signal_matrix.signal: Franklin Templeton hires Head of Franklin Crypto
signal_matrix.description: Null hypothesis (routine staffing) holds. Single data point per LZ-RC-002. Not XRP-specific. No adjustment.

Track record shows -0.43 drift on Circle signals (historical over-scoring). Competitive overlap with thesis limited to stablecoin space, not cirBTC specifically. Intermediary source (CoinDesk). Layer 2 already applied track record correction. No further adjustment.

signal_matrix.signal: CFTC suing states over prediction market jurisdiction
signal_matrix.description: Connection to thesis attenuated — prediction markets, not settlement. No adjustment.

signal_matrix.signal: GENIUS Act stablecoin provisions under scrutiny
signal_matrix.description: Null hypothesis holds (normal legislative iteration). Directional ambiguity per LZ-EH-005 is the finding. Single source. No adjustment.

signal_matrix.signal: RippleXDev hackathon — AI agents + XRPL + RLUSD
signal_matrix.description: CL-034 correctly applied — ecosystem development, not deployment. No adjustment.

signal_matrix.signal: Ripple RLUSD social impact deployment metrics
signal_matrix.description: Real operational usage at modest scale ($53.6M vs $5B target). CL-007 correctly applied. No adjustment.

signal_matrix.signal: BTC and ETH ETFs under outflow pressure
signal_matrix.description: Critical context for XRP ETF signal. ETH lifetime net negative (-$308.5M) is a structural warning for the ETF category. No adjustment to scoring — this is primarily a contextual signal.
Structural data gap per CL-046, CL-048. Zero directional weight. No adjustment.
Per CL-004, XRP is currency-neutral. 10-day stale data. Contextual only. No adjustment.

active_tensions.description: Compound stress at CRITICAL with imminent cascade proximity. Brent $121.88 (emergency, 6-day stale), USD/JPY 159.60 (40bps from critical 160), JGB 2.274% (2.6bps from elevated 2.3%). All three legs deteriorating through causally connected Japan energy import channel. Operator action window: days. Second cycle at CRITICAL.
active_tensions.watch_for: (a) USD/JPY breach of 160. (b) JGB breach of 2.3%. (c) BOJ/MOF intervention announcement. (d) Hormuz de-escalation signal. (e) Current Brent price confirmation.

active_tensions.description: RLUSD at $1.371B NEW LOW — below prior $1.494B contraction floor. Declining during extreme fear, anomalous for stablecoins. Kill switch pace requires $13.44M/day net growth from declining base. $1.2B CRITICAL threshold is $171M below. Cyclical vs structural cause is the highest-value unanswered question.
active_tensions.watch_for: RLUSD recovery above $1.5B (de-escalation). Decline below $1.2B (CRITICAL). USDC/USDT comparison data (cyclical/structural determination). Named institutional RLUSD integration.

active_tensions.description: Kill switch cumulative deterioration at worst-ever state. Six of ten at WARNING or worse. Zero measurable adoption metrics improved this cycle. Kroll rating is the sole positive infrastructure signal but is a prerequisite, not adoption evidence.
active_tensions.watch_for: Any kill switch sustained improvement over 2+ cycles. Named institutional client. PermDEX first transaction. RLUSD above $1.5B. ETF AUM above $1.3B.

active_tensions.description: Falsification proximity increasing. CI-1 at NEGATIVE direction for 2 consecutive cycles. CI-2 one reclassification from potential negative flip. May 1 Hidden Road deadline is the nearest catalyst. If CI-2 flips and CI-1 reaches CONVERGING_NEGATIVE, system approaches 2 indices toward the 3-index falsification threshold.
active_tensions.watch_for: Named enterprise customer. PermDEX institutional transaction. ETF flow reversal sustained 3+ weeks. Hidden Road XRPL activity before May 1. Any signal that arrests negative convergence.

active_tensions.description: Hidden Road 32+ days without XRPL on-chain transactions while actively deploying on Hyperliquid. May 1 deadline: no XRPL evidence = reclassify to 0 confirmed XRPL deployments, eliminating sole Announcement-to-Deployment progress. Per LZ-EH-003, deploying elsewhere while not deploying on XRPL is a behavioral signal.
active_tensions.watch_for: Hidden Road XRPL on-chain transactions before May 1. Any Ripple/Hidden Road XRPL-specific disclosure.

active_tensions.description: PermDEX at 44 days with zero confirmed institutional adoption. May 20 = 90-day checkpoint. Zero adoption at 90 days = kill switch escalation to potential TRIGGERED consideration. Competing infrastructure scaling during same period.
active_tensions.watch_for: First PermDEX institutional participant on-chain. New institutional trust lines. May 20 checkpoint.

active_tensions.description: XRP ETF AUM at $1.117B, 22% of $5B target. Weekly outflows -$3.56M. Cumulative net flow negative (-$258K). $1B CRITICAL threshold $117M below. Sector-wide outflow context mitigates XRP-specific concern but does not change trajectory.
active_tensions.watch_for: Weekly flows sustained positive 3+ weeks. AUM below $1B = CRITICAL. New ETF approval. F&G recovery above 25.

active_tensions.description: SEC tokenization exemption unpublished after five consecutive cycles. May be gating factor for PermDEX adoption. Final cycle before reclassification as STRUCTURAL_GAP if no resolution. Linked to T-7 (PermDEX 90-day checkpoint).
active_tensions.watch_for: SEC exemption text publication. Post-publication XRPL-specific vs chain-agnostic determination.
